review_text: Hours are wrong on the google website. This is the 2nd time we showed up when it said they were open and they still had the doors locked. . Please fix your website on google. This is possible through the google business page. This has been Edited after showing up later when they did open. Food was great and beer were great. Will be back again.

Beer was warm.
Lacked depth of flavor.

Food was ice cold.
Very salty.

Cool little local brewery. From the makers of Bills Best BBQ sauce. Beers are very good. Much better than I have had any any local brewery. They serve PA alcohols and homemade sandwiches. Very small but will expand with outside seating. Owners are very friendly local people. It has a cool interior and a funky vibe. I will return very soon.
This place has a chance for opportunity, the Chefs sauces are delightful, and his recipes are soulful. The owner's love for music 👍.  Hope to see it grow. Good luck guys
Food was wonderful. Emily was sweetb and wonderful.
Nice place for music off the main area of phoenixville.  Decent food but drink prices were pretty expensive.

Really nice place. Great outdoor area and pet friendly is awesome.
$7.00 pints are a little pricey.
Menu is limited but hopefully will improve as they ramp up.

Atmosphere and beer were great. The food was bland, lacked seasoning and not worth the time to wait for a table.  Go for the beer and skip the food. I had the chicken and waffle sandwich with fries and an app of poutine that tasted of potato and flour.

Cool place. The outside seating with the fires and heaters is great. The only downside is the price. They're charging like $8-9 for a beer and they're all either 12oz cans or these small drafts. Helltown makes good beer but it's the only option there. We would have stayed and hung out longer but we didn't want to spend $50 on 5 or 6 beers.
Cool vibe and who doesn't like a beer garden but I sure was shell shocked with the drink prices. Again? Maybe maybe not.
Great live music and wine!

Visiting Pittsburgh for the week from the west coast. Came in on a Monday and it was sparsely busy. Waited over 10 minutes for someone to take our order. Watched an 8 top that came in 5 minutes after us get served right away. The space is cool which is what saved it from a one star but this place does give off a very hipster vibe. And being ignored definitely made me feel like I wasn't "cool" enough to be there.

Love the venue and the drinks but had terrible service. Friends and I stopped in and ordered a pizza. After an hour still hadn’t gotten it. Asked about it and they told us 15 more minutes. An hour later, still no pizza. No apology or awareness at all from the serving staff. Disappointed.
the beers were good and it's a nice space. Pleasant

One rating, everyone knows the rules: 4.8

Overall opinion: will come back for the beers and if I have a large group, but not for the food or atmosphere if with a smaller group. Details below.

The positives: large space, great for big groups especially if you have kids, tons of games and things to do, staff is really great, cheese bar with specialty cheese options, smokehouse pizza was good (tasted like a barbecue chicken pizza with a hint of sausage and the crust was pretty good), beers were really good as well (had the Continental Lager and Compound Kolsch; fiancee liked the Clear Hitch).

The negatives: the burger looked good but tasted awful, I honestly can't say for sure they used ground beef it was that bad. While there's a ton of space, it isn't a very cozy place to go and have a beer because of its more industrial building feel. The kids were pretty loud making it not a great place to relax.
Incredibly rude and discriminatory company.  Wouldn’t allow 80 year old patron to sit while we were in line.  Man out front yelled and argued with us the whole time.

Mainly Stay Away
1. Dirty Bathroom.
2. Dirty & Sticky Tables and Stained Couches
3. Flying Little Black Bugs All Over
4. Order your FOOD at the bar ONLY No Waiter / Waitress SERVICE
5. Then they have to find YOU to delivery your food (COLD)
6. VERY Slow service for food.
7. Dirty Plates Piled up on the table
8. Small Parking Lot
9. Chicken COOP and FIRE TRUCK in the Parking Lot (WHY)
10. Waited over 23 mins for 1 plate of food
11. It started to Rain outside and the roof leaked on the area we were sitting
12. Good place for Kids but not Drunks together at a BREWING COMPANY??
13. They have board games but 2 of them had missing pieces
14. Lots of stuff BROKEN
They do have a GOOD beer selection
BUT with all the problems the cool atmosphere was RUINED. I took a few pictures that will not load up... SORRY GUYS YOU MISS THE BALL..
Great pizza.  Mostly good beers.  Staff and service is great
Nice little place with good beer
Really nice friendly place! Good prices and the pizza is awesome! They have weekly trivia night and a mug club with lots of perks. Will definitely be going back.

Bad experience from the start. Not welcoming when you walk in. Went up to the bar to order our food and drinks and were never even acknowledged. I understand there were a few people sitting at the bar but not enough to confuse who was already taken care of. Stood by the food ordering area wide open. Felt ignored and awkward standing there so we left. Could of at least said hi I will be with you in a minute!

Nice looking place but the food was definitely not worth the money we spent.  The hamburger I had was way too small for the bun.  The drink I ordered did not come out correctly.  The worst part was water leaking from the ceiling in the bathroom.  They had buckets under the leaks but it did not help.  I came out with wet feet from walking through the puddles on the floor.
Food was good and hot. Downside took almost an hour to get food
I really wanted to like this place and support new owners. I found the food lacking it wasn't even mediocre. Their brews were good if you like brews.
Awful beer it was green

Beer was great! We had the saison and coffee cup porter. Nachos were just the right size portion. Pulled pork and cole slaw was tasty. Unfortunately the soft pretzel was not good at all, squishy/soggy from the microwave. Not sure I'll come again for food, but would come back for beer. With the friendly staff, extra clean (and new) building, clean roomy bathrooms, this brewery has great potential!
Nice to have a micro Brew option in Sunbury, good beer pleasant atmosphere, we will be back
Yummy pizza and beer is very good.
Good beer and pizza too
Good beer and pizza
Good beer

I have always supported kettle works and loved the atmosphere, however, I recently had a very bad experience there. Obviously, we’re still in a pandemic so I would expect that the mask rules be followed and enforced at bars and restaurants. I understand that people don’t have to wear them at tables, but should have them on when walking around, etc. I went up to the counter to order more drinks and an older man did not have his mask on while ordering. I asked him to put his mask on(as the counter is a communal area) and he replied, “I can’t drink my beer with a mask on.” I asked the bartender to enforce the rule and he said, “oh, he’s a regular, he doesn’t have COVID.” I was clearly upset and was brushed off. I guess your regulars are more important than every other paying customer. I will not be returning.

The food quality is alright, nothing special or particularly good. The rib is bland, onion soup is decent though. A bit pricey compare to other chains consider that you don't get bread, peanuts, salad and other stuffs with an entree. The dinner special is an okay deal though, full rack rib with fries and coleslaw is ~$15. Our server was not so attentive, forget to refill our drinks, put in an extra order on the bill when fixing an overly salty flatbread... just not my type of place.
A great dining experience! Covid friendly, staff were nice and restaurant was clean. I'd eat here again, wasn't a fan of the sw eggrolls, won't be getting them anytime soon.

A friend and I were racially profiled just last night 5/21/21. The greeter at the front door asked if we had seat preferences and I replied no not at all. He then Informed that there will be a 10-15 minutes wait. As we were walking out of the restaurant two Caucasian ladies were seated immediately. 2-3 minutes a group of 3 individuals  (Caucasians) were seated immediately. My friend walked back into the restaurant to ask for an explanation in which the greeter acted if as he could not do so. Two of his coworker apologized which was not acceptable and informed that he was new at the position. Highly upset of this organization. I really try my best not to throw the race card but it clearly showed last night.

Such a great place to come eat, drink and socialize with friends and family... food is always great drinks are always flowing and the prices are standard so not crazy expensive.

The staff are friendly and kind always willing to assist in all needs.
I highly recommend checking out the environment here.

My only gripe is they removed my favorite meal the jambalaya.. so so sad now. 😞

The food is delicious and a very friendly environment. However, I placed an order online for a specific date and delivery time and the food showed up cold an hour late. While I am normally very happy, tonight I am not impressed.
Only went for drinks. They were decent. Large bar, with typical bar food.

I almost always have had good experiences here. However, I want to note that one time when I came here my burger was totally burnt. I mean, it was black, hard, and disgusting. After a discussion with the manager, Eddie, they compensated my entire meal due to how long I had to wait. This was only one bad experience though and I have had many great experiences here over the years. The food is very good and the atmosphere is great. Parking can sometimes be an issue on certain days and at certain times of day.
Still suffering from short staff. Loved the check-in from the driveway. Staff was very slow with refilling drinks.
The food was ok, nothing to go crazy over. I had the rib eye. Waitress took forever with drinks.
Very good food...could have been checked on at least one or two time... But overall a very nice place and would recommend it..just go early or be ready to wait if go at prime times...
Good food, poor timing when ordering, continued to push back the order placed ahead of time.
outstanding! We both had burgers and fries.  Very good food and fun atmosphere.

Very poor service.  Waited 10 minutes at table before even being acknowledged.  The full rack of ribs hardly had any meat on it and the mashed potatoes came in a bowl? With not even a scoop of coleslaw as a garnish?  Potatoes were cold with literally a teaspoon of gravy on them.  Pretty bad when desert becomes the highlite of the meal :(  Maybe next time I will only get the desert and save $40!!!!

Terrible experience at Millers.our server was Lindsay R.we ordered drinks ,2 soups,burger and wings.Soups came out fast.burger and wings came out in one hour .By the time it came out we were not hungry nor we had an appetite that was before.
Took only couple of bites on the burger,never finished it,took with me to finish later.Burger was good,wings were below average quality.

Bloody Mary was good.
Ill try other millers but not this one.

Enjoyed going here with my husband. The soft pretzel (pictured) was good, especially with mustard sauce. Cute how they make it look like a smiley face. Had the vegetarian flatbread for my meal...did not like it as much as the pretzel.
Great food. As always. Service was a little slow but attentive. Will be going back.

We have eaten here fairly often. Usually, I would say the fare is good, predictable, and priced decently.

Today's visit was underwhelming. We ordered the Bavarian pretzel and beer cheese dip. The dip was bland and pretty thin. The pretzel was ok although not as good as the Newportville Inn. We also ordered the Zinger Mountain of fries (or some such absurdly monikered dish). They should just name it a plate of fries with melted cheddar that have a few chicken fingers on it. There was nothing like what was pictured. And all the cheese served to do was make it impossible to take the dish apart to eat. In addition, the chicken was dried out. The whole dish was greasy.
I would suggest creating a cheese sauce for this dish, along with a sour cream/ ranch sauce. Construct and plate it in such a way that it actually resembles what you have sold it as.

The server was friendly and we were seated quickly. Although the bench I was on was shared with the table behind me. So anytime either side moved, the whole thing jumped and rattled.

The beer list was also adequate. And the overall atmosphere was pleasant.

Overall, very disappointing.

Evening update:

The manager called to check in and was very kind. Listened to our frustration and said she would send a note inviting us back to try again.
RY was really attentive and helpful. My friends and I were very satisfied with the service he provided us.

Food took too long and when given it was cold. Waitress was not attentive to our table as often as she should have been. No organization at all. This visit was during the day. Host is miserable. He is not pleasant at all. Doesn't smile what so ever
Good food, good brews,  great service
Overcooked steak, no takeout utensils despite specifically requesting it, will never order from here again.
Bar area in back? Our family was sat back there. Too loud, couldn't feel comfy.
Great food selection. Nice atmosphere.
Food was good 40 mins wait

Bad service. Cold food. Had to get two different manages for our food. Several people seated after us got there apps and dinner before us. The only time seen waiter was end of meal. Trying better his tip money. Also other tables were done. So we are done with the place !!! Will tell other friend of the poor service also food.

So disappointed with this location. Too many other places in the area to ever come back here. Food was ok, but clearly not fresh. Service was awful. I sat at the bar and was all but ignored. Had to flag someone down to take my order and when they finally came over they seemed as though it was an annoyance. Appetizer was wrong, but no one came over, so I couldn't address it. Was never asked if I wanted a refill of my drink. Entree took so long that by the time it came I asked for a to-go box. Bartender didn't come over again until I paid the check (which was soaked from being left in an actual puddle of water on the bar).
Food good, service slow....
It was ok I had an 11$ crazer salad, the chicken was overcooked, also my romaine lettuce was all big thick stalks.,, Staff was great and our waitress was.very nice and attentive.
Food and drinks good but bathroom was filthy! I dont think it was cleaned from Friday.

Seated quickly but then servce was super slow  in a not very
busy restaurant.  I was there with 3 children under the age of 4 with no consideration  for the fact  that we needed food to keep them behaved.  Took forever to get ice cream and then get the credit card picked up to pay the bill i had asked for earlier. Expected better. Almost every restaurant  experience  we have had since bucks reopened  has been perfect. This was not but food was great
Terrible service, they don't care about there customers. I'll never eat here again!!!
Food over cooked, forgot our side, and service was slow with limited guests.  Couldn't understand
Food over cooked, forgot our side, and service was slow with limited guests.  Couldn't understand
Service sucks. Food was not served at the proper time and slow
Terrible service, they don't care about there customers. I'll never eat here again!!!

First time ordering takeaway here. Got 2 Filet Mignon's & a Sirloin. 1 Filet was very good but the other 2 steaks, not so much (chewy & tough)  Fries & baked potatoes were good but vegetables not good.  No bread or rolls, if that matters to you. Online ordering and pickup were very easy and the order was accurate, nothing was missing.
Food was good,service also good ,clean establishment, will go again

Went Saturday night got there at 715pm got called for a table at 825 sat down 826pm ordered beer at 836pm was told at 850pm that they were out of bluemoon draft ok ordered bud draft manager came over told us we are out of bud draft ok we ordered another draft beer. 910pm i flagged down manager ordered appetizer. 925pm appetizer came out still no beer 927 beer came flagged down waitress asked if we can order took our order 945pm dinner came out. Ordered dessert. 1010pm left building..we usually go every Saturday..wont be visiting for awhile..our bill usually runs $95

Food is always great, but I will say that the way they set up the customer pick up is very disorganized. I parked my vehicle walked inside to grab my food and was told I had to go back outside restart my vehicle and drive it up to the side of the building and that they couldn’t process my payment inside or hand me my food inside although there were other customers inside I was very confused about it. And then I ended up waiting almost an hour for my food that was ready in 20 minutes due to miscommunication between the staff. I feel like if my payment could have been processed inside in my food given to me right then and there none of this extra space and time would’ve occurred
We were there just there for dinner. My food was cold. Was not happy. Don't think I'll be back.
Good service.  Tasty food.
Affordable prices, very nice staff

This was our first visit to this place.
Service is poor, for it took forever to receive our food, about 25 mins after we ordered it. It appears that they did that to keep us ordering more drinks, because that was moving fast. In addition, I ordered 22oz beer glasses, however, although they mentioned that they carry them, they kept serving me in 16oz glasses.
Food choice was very lacking as well.
On a positive note, they have a lot of TV monitors, unfortunately, they do not have cable, only dish, and guess what, it was raining, so you could imagine the quality of the images.
My suggestion, if you want to drink at $4.50 the 16oz glass of beer, and you are not too interested on eating because you are with a gang of buddy's and you only want to watch a game, this will be an alright place to go, however, make sure you don't go there on a rainy day.
Good service.  Tasty food.
One and done only enjoyed the soup horrible server
Don't want to go back soon.
Only giving a 3. Steak on salad must've been grilled with fish. If I wanted fish I would have ordered it. Apps were great and our server dante was excellent.
Decent but not great

Don't order takeout and expect it to be ready on time or correct. This is my second to go order wrong in a week. Both times I didn't receive all the food I paid for. The manager gives out gift cards as an apology but that doesn't change the fact that I wanted all the food I ordered when I ordered it. Why do I tip the person running the to go counter when they can't do their job and make sure everything ordered is in the bag. Not to mention they 'lost' my order which took an additional 40 minutes to get my still incomplete order that was lukewarm. Not sure if dining in is a better experience since I've only ordered to go orders but the what food they give you is flavorful but inconsistent. At least I have a gift card.... guacamole with my fajitas would have been better.
Pretty good food.  Bar drinks weren't that awesome.  Nice staff.
Average food.   Service was a bit slow.  Probably wont go back here.
Food is always good here, decent choice if you're going to a franchise.
Yummy food good drinks

Dining in is fine. I am not usually a complainer bit every time we order for takeout the order is wrong! Tonight I got my chicken blt with no bacon or Cajun ranch sauce. This is the first time I have reviewed but the fourth time my order was wrong.
The hostess wasn't nice or cordial at all... She needs to learn how to address and handle ppl. She is not friendly at all. The food was ok. The service was good.

We went on a Saturday so they were understandable busy, it took about 35 minutes to get a table then another 20 MINUTES for a waitress to acknowledge us for a drink order. We finally got our food after another 30 MINUTES, i order zingers with hot sauce, no sauce on my zingers and the inside was all chicken fat and slime. It was completely inedible and i left having to go elsewhere for dinner. They used to be really good, I'm sorely disappointed.
I had the worse food ever.

Very nice manager and staff is awesome food is delicious 😋

I normally love this place and would give 5 stars, but I just ordered a zingers mountain melt (same order I always get) through doordash, and There are no bacon bits AND no cheese! It’s just zingers and fries. And i didn’t get ranch. Extremely disappointed.

I didn't find the seating or the atmosphere very comfortable.  You may like it, but it's not for me.  Sent feedback on your site as requested.  You are very popular and that's good, but it comes with costs that the restaurant can be overcrowded and wait times can be long.

Sevice could be better in the bar area. Too long to take order had to flag server to take our order twice and she responds back with an attitude. Didn't refill our picture of beer had drop if at the bar and wait long. Didn't come to our table to check on our party to see if we needed anything else. Never came back to collect the check. Waited long time finally just we just left. We paid the check with cash and left it on the table hope it was still there after we left. The bar area was not busy.
35 minutes to get a salad horrible
Waited along time to be waited on very very unhappy with the service there.
Slow service and cold food

Food was good
I would say they had an off night. One friend’s order totally forgotten.  No presentation on plate- very disappointing.

We come here frequently. My sons favorite place for wings. We did not have a good experience tonight. I was extremely disappointed !!!! We waited for our food and thought it was taking a long time for appetizers to co.e our. It was because next thing you know we got our meals and no appetizers. We had to send them back and off they went to find our appetizers.  They came and the manager was going to let our meals sit in the window. I let him know that was unacceptable. Who wants prime rib that sat for 15 minutes in the window. The waitress made sure we got fresh. The manager never apologized for mess up or checked to make sure everything was fixed!!!

Service was fast and friendly
Flow was OK.
I'll go back again

Sorry for the 3 stars, I typically really enjoy the Ale House.  Been to a few of them in Florida and never an issue.  Was up in Pa visiting family, called to order a couple of items for take out and was given a total over the phone, asked her to confirm and she did, placed the order.  When I got there it was moe than double.
It a chain... How great coyld it be...
Their zingers are amazing
It a chain... How great coyld it be...
Ordered takeout for the family.  They forgot the ice cream for both kids meals.  Ordered a chicken blt sandwich and they forgot the blt part.  Messed up half the order.

The burger patty was completely mushy, the waitress took our appetizer order and never came back for our actual entree order. The mozzarella sticker were hollow and cheeseless inside. Disappointed
This particular location had slow service and the food was not as good as its sibling location in Mt Laurel NJ.
This particular location had slow service and the food was not as good as its sibling location in Mt Laurel NJ.

Our family of three has been faithful patrons at Millers for three years, usually visiting 2-3 times a month. We really enjoyed the snow crab meal and were disappointed when they went away; but returned and found some new favorites.  Prime rib and ribs were are go to.  French onion soup and calamari are amazing.
So last week our experience was a bit disappointing and not a predictor of the future. Not super packed -and yet service was slow.  Ribs were a bit overdone and sauce with charred and too spicy. Prime Rib was tough and beyond grisly. Took forever to fit bill and my son never got his ice cream.    We will not be back for awhile:(
Nickel and Dime operation, you want this - then you're going to have to pay this, amazing they didn't charge for parking

Feel like the bartenders are good for the most part. Some of them can be kind of standoffish if you aren't a regular. Felt down right ignored tonight. Good service applies to everyone, not just the regulars or people you consider to be friends.  Very bad business practice for sure!!
Won't be back here anytime soon.

First I wouldn't even give this one star but not giving a star was not an option.  Awful.! Food came to the table cold and over cooked.  Waited 45 minutes for the food to cooked and served.  We have always liked this location better than the one in Mt Laurel NJ. We will not being returning.  It is a shame the food and service was always good, but not anymore.
Over priced. My food had to go back, overcooked steak. New steak brought out it too was over cooked. Just took it didn't want to wait any longer.
The atmosphere was great. The food was a little pricey and small serving but pretty good although I've never heard of charging for a house salad. And drinks were light.

This is a very loud place to eat in. The volume here, even in the dining room, is a bit excessive. The beer is cold, but the food is underwhelming. I usually go to people watch but if you're trying to get lit, there's cheaper places to booze.

We visited here after my cousin in law's wedding for a quick bite to eat and some drinks.

Often when you order an Old Fashioned, it isn't made well and with a cheap poor tasting Whiskey. Considering the fact we arrived 1 hour before closing, I expected the same type of poorly made without care Old Fashioned, yet I was extremely surprised by the taste.

The fish and chips I ordered was fantastic, lightly breaded yet crispy.

You can't expect much from Miller's because after all its a Franchise and with that being said it's merely average.

Food is fantastic, service not so much. Waited more than 20 minutes and not even acknowledged for drinks or anything after being seated. And we weren't the only ones to not be acknowledged, either! Brutal job! Never going back!
Food was ok drinks were overpriced and were not made well. Waitress was very friendly  and efficient.

It was just ok. The sweet potato fries that came out were not hot, and while the ribs tasted ok, they weren't anything worth coming back for. It was busy when we were there so the server wasn't as prompt as she normally is (totally not her fault). This place is great for sitting at the bar and watching the game with a beer and an appetizer, but not for a family meal.

Food was good, service was horrible. We were there for 90 minutes and only saw our waitress when she took our order and brought our drinks and again at the end of our meal. We even had to ask another employee for our check. I don't know what Miller's Ale House policy is, but someone other then our waitress brought out our appetizers and then someone else brought out our meal. We have visited Miller's Ale House many times over the years and had good service each time, but not this time. After the waitress asked us how everything was and I told her my throughts, she gave us a snarky reply and said that she didn't need this and had the Manager bring us our check. At no time did we raise our voice at the waitress, we just gave our honest opinion of her service. The Manager did comp our meal, even after we said we would paid for the meal, after all we did eat it.

We actually stopped eating here due to poor service. Initially it was a decent place for food and beer but have decided not to patron at Miller's due to the service the last 2-3 times I've been there.

First visit to the Langhorne location, since it is actually the closest one to my home.   I the past, I have had nothing but great experiences at the NE Philly and Willow Grove locations, but the Langhorne establishment was very disappointing.  We were seated before 5 PM on Sat night with a party of 4.   It took more than half an hour for the appetizers to come out of the kitchen and easily an hour for the dinners.   Initially the waitress spent a good portion of the time apologizing that things were talking so long, telling us she was constantly checking.  But I guess even she got discouraged, because eventually she disappeared before the dinners came out and only saw her once before the check arrived.   While the food was good, it wasn’t up to the usual Miller’s standards, specifically the fries, which were both cold and soggy, a clear indication that the meals did spend some time sitting around in the kitchen.   In the future I’ll stick to the other locations.

The bartender stopped refreshing my margaritas at the bar during the final game of the world series. We had food and he didn't offer me water or even had a good excuse like he was that busy. The food was superb! Really homerun on the food!!

Truly disappointing experience. We waited so long after being seated that we had to ask another waitress if she would help us. She took our drink orders and our waiter finally showed up with them. It took a very long time to get our food. Our waiter was absent except to say that it should only be another 3 minutes...several times. Really slow service, people seated after us got their food before we did. The food was marginal at best. My burger was a mess and the brioche bun was stale, the French fries had obviously been sitting around for a while too. My wife's salad wasn't much better, really poorly done with low grade ingredients. We had to keep asking for refills which took too long. Even getting the check was slow. I can't see any reason to ever go back.

Food is pretty good but the selection doesnt change drastically. The beer selection is amazing. They usually have some nice ipas available on draft.

Sadly my only complaint is service so hit or miss. I've been there with my wife and 2 kids and have had the best waiter possible. And weve been there and had the worst ever.

Strange dining experience. First off, our server (& the service itself) was excellent. Very attentive, & the place did look very clean.

Now, the rest of things: 1) Never been to a casual restaurant that didn't have sweetened iced tea. Our server said the manager thinks people have too much sugar, so they only had unsweetened tea. Huh? If you want to dictate dining guidelines to me, pls do it on your own time. And when sugar was asked for, they brought out, not sugar, but some sweetner substitute (which can't be healthy, esp for kids).  2) Appetizer, the spinach / cheese / artichoke dip, tasted like none of those ingredients & had the consistency of watery pesto. Totally bland (even after salt & pepper).  3) My entree, steak fajitas, along w/ the peppers & onions that accompanied it, were cooked perfectly (temperature-wise). The flavor was decent, but had I not added guacamole to my fajitas, they might have been a bit bland. My wife's salad was fine. Re our kids meals (which were free w/ our adult meals), they said the mac & cheese had zero taste, nothing cheesey about it at all.

So...  Nice, clean atmosphere w/ excellent service but mostly bland food. Given that we're tourists w/ limited time out here, w/ so many other awesome dining choices out here in the Lancaster area, I'd need a very special reason to go back there.

Plenty of other customer friendly establishments close by with great food and service. Don't understand why I can't give 0 stars.

Served my guest & forgot to put my order in to be cooked. I ordered a sirloin steak with bleu cheese & a vegetable medley. The steak was pretty good & the veggies were fresh & tasty. Server offered a discount due to slow service but there was no discount on check.
Good food. Service was a little slow.

So incredibly disappointed. Went at an off time on a weekend. My wife and I felt like a burger so after perusing the menu online, we decided to stop in. We were seated in the section where the bar is located (though not at the bar itself). We sat there for at least 15 minutes with waitresses passing by going to other tables and serving customers. We also observed the bartender serving drinks to people at the bar in between texting on her cellphone. There were waitresses having personal conversations with each other and depriving customers of good service in favor of talking about their personal life. After all this not one person came to our table the entire time. No drinks, no, "we'll be with you shortly". Nothing. This is unacceptable considering there were maybe 4 filled tables in the place! We told the hostess up front what happened and that we're leaving. Then we wished "good luck" to a new customer that happened to come in at the same time we were leaving. Not going back. You have to see least acknowledge people are there being just seating them!
Service was TERRIBLE but not the servers fault.  The bar was full and they only had one bartender on duty.  The food tastes old.  Just a bad experience all around.
Food was good but since when do you get a steak meal with no silverware. Person who served the meal said, sorry will be right back which never happened. Had to chase another person down for utensils

My husband and I just left Miller’s. After being seated by the hostess, 15-20 minutes had gone by and a server still hadn’t came over to greet us and take our drink orders. There were even two servers sitting two tables away counting tip money. All the tables were empty and only a few customers at the bar. We thought that was ridiculous so we left. No server or hostess even said anything to us as we left. I would understand if it was busy but they were dead. I don’t think we’ll be going back there any time soon. If at all.

I ordered the Salmon + Shrimp combo and my Salmon was raw. The waitress was not knowledgeable about the menu. She seemed like she was in a rush. The manager came to the table and sat down and mind you she was a nice size woman. She addressed the issue but did nothing to solve the problem. Gave us the bill like nothing went wrong. I had to wait another 10-15 minutes for my food. I don't  think I will be coming back.  I'm being nice by giving two stars.

Went there for wings, they were pretty average and not crispy. Just a preference. The good part was that the cocktails were good and good prices. Unfortunately, I think we went on an off-night for the restaurant, but we probably won’t be back.

Just kind of another chain restaurant. First 2 times we tried to go, there was minimum 25 minute wait, and with a 1 year old that doesnt really fly. Third time, we got in. It wasn't bad, just typical pub food. Took a little long to come out, especially considering there weren't a ton of people there at the time.
All in all, this is something you could pass up.

My wife and I just visited this place last week since we had heard about its opening. I have to say that I wasn't impressed in the least it appears to be part of a chain of stores with the same name. I'd say if you're looking for a good hamburger I'd head for Red Robin. It seemed like our waitress was in a hurry to get us in and out of the place as soon as possible, it wasn't that it was full  or that there were people lined up at the door there clearly were not. I understand it's not supposed to be considered fine dining but it even falls short of an expensive hamburger joint or Sports Bar. If you like loads of HD TVs and loud music This Is The Place To Go. I'll give it a miss next time.
it's ok here. service could have been better... food was fair. I was seated on the bar side. a little too loud. I'm not a bar person, per se. I had a beautiful view into the men's restroom.

So I wrote a review 10 months Iago praising this place.  I have been back 3x and each time was a different negative experience.  I will say the 2 stars are because my food has always been good and the end result has always been an attempt to right the situation...its the service that I have a problem with.  Each time the servers take forever to great and to come back when needing to order. Once food is ordered, it seems to take forever to come out, regardless of how busy it is.  This last time, we order and app which took over 15 mins.  Then it appears the food order was lost, cause when I went to kitchen...thats right cause our server couldnt be found, they had to go through OLD orders to find it.  They played it off that it wasnt forgotten, yet it was no where on their current screen.  So we get are good  "on the fly"...my steak was good, kids food, zinger, fine..the pictures are my wifes steak...asked for medium...it came out rare.  She returned it.  The manager comes back and we explain and my wife refuses another.  The manager comps our meal, gives a giftcard to come back and send us on our way with free dessert and still made my wifes dinner...but to go.  OK...sounds like some attempt at redemption,...however...when we get home, her steak was still under cook.  Will try again when maybe they instill the customer service of that manager into their servers. As much as I appreciate the .managers efforts to save face, the experience was still 90 mins of failure.

Horrible service, waited 90 minutes for food as our server was too focused on larger tables to care.  Alicia never checked on us after taking our order only when the check was ready to pay. FOH manager never stopped at our table to see if we were ok.

Victoria the manager is terrible at resolving the issue. Filed a survey back on the 22nd of February, we spoke about it on the 23rd and just yesterday got an email about my check return. Was promised a letter and things to return but have not received them yet.

Have had better customer experience and response/care from better locations.

Basic food and don't buy the pitcher of booze because you'll get no alcohol content with it. Lack of a pitcher of booze, rip off to your wallet. Save yourself $10 and get a water, taste about the same
Rude... They cancel right when we order.. they basically take our money. This is the problem with doorash/Miller's ale house.. what kind of name is that??.. :P
Rude... They cancel right when we order.. they basically take our money. This is the problem with doorash/Miller's ale house.. what kind of name is that??.. :P

Great place to go ALONE. This place is sooooooo loud you can't have a conversation with anyone.  I couldn't even hear what the server was trying to relay to us about the establishment.  I ordered a pasta dish, shrimp linguine or something, it was completely tasteless.  I was under the impression that the food at this restaurant was top notch so I didn't eat all day.  I ate my meal only because I was starving and I didn't want to have to stop somewhere on the way home and pay for another meal or make something when I got home.  I'm a huge sports fan, but there is no way I would ever go here to watch a game.  There are so many TVs with so many different shows on I would find it impossible to enjoy what I wanted to watch.  I can have a better time at home making my own food and watching sports and I don't have to worry about damaging my hearing.
They are very slow! I hate coming here to be honest.

Long walk from parking. Yucky dirty ashtray outside the front door. I like dirty martinis but they didn't have any olives! Service was okay not great. Food was really good. Pricing was a bit on the high side. I probably won't bother going back anytime soon....too many other awesome places in the area.

I've visited three times, and everytime I've left a little annoyed. I've received food that i have watched sit in the window for ten minutes. I waited 45 minutes the other night for a cold burger in an empty bar on sunday evening. If I go again, it won't be by choice. But i will say this. The food is good.
Food is great but the bartending service was awful.
It tasted like Applebee's, Ruby Tuesday's, Buffalo Wild Wings...  but Applebee's the most.
Great wings
Great wings
Disgusting..had to kill multiple bugs crawling up the chairs and onto table. Food was good but had hard time eating after the bugs.
Huge selection on beer. Food was kind of salty for my liking.
Food was ok. Service was terrible. We were there for an hour and a half and saw our watress a total of 4 times. Not planning on going back.
Staff was excellent, drinks were weak, food was good.
Average food...fettuccine alfredo wasnt in alfredo sauce at all but rather some oil and parmesan cheese....disappointing.

Went there for a Sunday family night our waiter was horrible she got in an argument with another table and then she took it out on our table she ignored us for half the time we were there her manager had to service us instead of her her manager had lots of apologies but when she came to deliver the check to us the waitress was very rude to us we paid our check and we were getting ready to leave I needed to use the restroom as we were the last people to leave the restaurant for the night when I was coming out of the restroom I hear our waitress say I hope they get in a car accident and died speaking about our table I feel as though that was very inappropriate and she should be fired immediately it is never okay for a waitress or anyone for that matter to wish death on a family someone needs to deal with this right away
You cut my drinks off cause of my accent? They even said to wrap it off to our table... worst place to have a drink , service “-1” from scale of 1-10

The waitress was rude...we sat 30 mins and then we're told it WAS LUNCH TIME!!! WE LEFT...and no one was at the bar and the place only had a few people there...sooo bad....the waitress/bartender should be fired for being so rude
Ran out of beer ..food ok. Service good
First visit, only been open a few months.  On a Thursday night, pretty loud for my ears, tons of TVs. Food was only ok and on the expensive side. They did have a unique local beer which I enjoyed.
Generally good food. Good service. Don't get the  nachos!
Wasnt there

For being a chain restaurant, the staff seemed to lack the proper training and knowledge of the menu.  I was given the incorrect salad, and then given the correct one, with the chicken that was scraped off of the other. I know this because my now correct, Asian salad, had chicken with blue cheese crumbles smashed all over it. Overall this place seemed mismanaged and unable to handle a Tuesday night crowd.

**WOULD HAVE RATHER GONE TO MC DONALDS** Our server was great. The food was terrible. My daughters chicken appeared and tasted microwaved. The vegetables, mixed and broccoli, were raw and cold. The lobster tail was ungodly salty. Worst experience ever. We will not be returning for the food again.

Waited here at 4:05 was told it would be a hour wait an hour went by and two parties went ahead of us. Then when we asked them what was going on at 5:15 our names were not even on the list 10 minutes later we got our seats. After ordering our food it took 30 minutes for the appetizers. Then we had to ask for rolls our main food never came out till an hour and 15 minutes after waiting. When the food was brought one member of the table was never even brought their food. Then they forgot to replace mashpotatos that they never brought out after they finally brought that individual their meal.

For being a chain restaurant, the staff seemed to lack the proper training and knowledge of the menu.  I was given the incorrect salad, and then given the correct one, with the chicken that was scraped off of the other. I know this because my now correct, Asian salad, had chicken with blue cheese crumbles smashed all over it. Overall this place seemed mismanaged and unable to handle a Tuesday night crowd.
Server was terrible. Food was good when I finally got it 15 minutes after everyone else. Took 45 mi utes for the server to get the bill right. Overall poor experience this time
Decent food ok service. If looking for cool sports bar and cheap drinks great but otherwise just standard.
Server was terrible. Food was good when I finally got it 15 minutes after everyone else. Took 45 mi utes for the server to get the bill right. Overall poor experience this time
Meh food and non existent service. If you are looking for a spot with a liquor license and a deep dryer this will meet minimums.

First it was packed. They estimated at 75 min wait for a group of 7.  After 90 mins we were paged.  Hostess gave away our table to another group by mistake.  They wouldn't move them so we waited another 15 mins.  Food was tasty but much of it cold and not cooked right.  Server did the best she could.  They just seemed overwhelmed.  We argued about the compensation we should get for all the problems and finally settled.  I would go back cuzi like the place, but might avoid a Saturday night.

I went last night (Monday, June 3th, '18) and this is definitely a place you can pass up. Manager has no charisma and no business talking to people. He looks spaced out and like he's trying to remember a script. We ordered a Strawberry Coconut Mojito and "The Don" Blanco Margarita, but they were both out of Strawberry and Don Julio Blanco Tequila. Manager did not give us any options and just stood there waiting for us with a blank stare while we looked for something else to order. Now, instead of making it worth our while, those have to be the weakest cocktails we have ever had. Might as well kept our original orders cause I still doubt they had any alcohol in it. We switched to beers since clearly the bartender doesn't know what he's doing and I ordered the North Atlantic Lobster Tails... and guess what? They were out of that too. The manager didn't come out for that one and if it wasn't because our server, Diana, was a good one, I would have left at this point. They do make good food but management is bad if they're out of everything on a Monday, can't imagine a weekend here. Even entertainment wise, we were watching TV and programming just got switched in the middle of it and the only other TV with the same program got switched too. Could've at least left one for whoever was watching like us. I don't think I would be back unless I'm only looking to drink a few beers.
Decent bar and food, great for watching sports but nothing remarkable food-wise. Standard bar fare, affordable.
Dreadfully slow  and non friendly service.  Very underwhelming food.  Will not return

Horrrible experience. I wanted some ribs at first, they said they were out even though ribs are heir Thursday special. So I ordered the salmon that comes with coleslaw and a side. They server brought out the food, dint say anything so I asked her where the coleslaw was coz that was one of the reasons why I ordered that meal, she said ooh we don’t have that too, but no big deal coz it comes in a small container anyways. Dint offer a substitute or nothing! I think it wld have been more appropriate to let me know that they dint have coleslaw and let me decide if I still wanted the meal. I had driven all the way from Columbia Maryland, needless to say I’m never coming back.

Would not take a reservation for a party of ten. They said no exceptions but we could call a few minutes before and they would tell us if they could seat us.  We get there and there was a 2 hour wait. We left.You Don't want to help us, there are lots of other places to go.
Nice lunch specials but the service is always slow.
Dirty today. The floor was very greasy..  Didn't complain but didn't think the food was very good.
Wait staff slow. Just bar food . Overall just a ok place to watch sports
Dirty today. The floor was very greasy..  Didn't complain but didn't think the food was very good.
Bar staff was phenomenal. My burger was completely over cooked. It's your average chain restaurant.
15 mins into our lunch we were already being pushed, not too subtly, to finish.   Production line service.
It was later in the evening, service to be sat was very slow and it took to long for the food since it was slow. Should have been better!!
The food was okay. The service wasn't all that great. The menu selection wasn't as good as we thought it was going to be.
It was later in the evening, service to be sat was very slow and it took to long for the food since it was slow. Should have been better!!
We were so cold then too hot.
Mediocre at best. Long wait, service was marginal, food was meh.
Would not recommend this place to no one wish i could give it no stars
Just meh food. I call this shovelware, and it's meant to please the herd. Move on if you're looking for food made with an ounce of care.
Food ok. Very loud background.
waited 20 minutes for food only to our surprise what appeared to be microwaved chicken tenders.
Okay small drinks chain restaurant over price
No one has any idea how to do their job week at all. Unmanaged.

Food was eh. Disappointing.

Wish the food and waitress was better.
It was over an hour to get our food. It also took 45 minutes to get a cup of coffee.
Wait an hour and half for dinner still not get the full dinner we ordered and the place wasn't that busy at all, will not going back for awhile.
Stuffs are friendly!
Awesome food but The shift manager was rude waited to long on food poorly staffed . Never returning !
Lacked the energy and vibe of other millers I have been to.
The food I had wasn't great and they don't take reservations on weekends.

business_name: Stony Run Brew House | Brewery in York, PA
review_text: Ther service was great, the good was good and the beer was good. No complaints but also was not my favorite beer or food from York

business_name: Stony Run Brew House | Brewery in York, PA
review_text:
Social distancing and made me more onion rings because they felt it wasn't enough (it was).

Changed from 4 star to 2.
4/3/21 Sad that I have to change my opinion, I really like this little place but had to get up and leave this past Friday as no one was following any Covid protocol, no masks or spacing, filled to capacity.  Bartender was only person in the whole place wearing a mask.  Not sure what changed from my prior visit where they were actively following guidelines.

business_name: Stony Run Brew House | Brewery in York, PA
review_text: Good beers. Nice find. I'll have to try food next time.

business_name: Stony Run Brew House | Brewery in York, PA
review_text:
Great place! Atmosphere is relaxing with many different craft and mixed choices.  Food is excellent - chips & salsa, fish & chips, and pork barbecue all fantastic!

Looking forward to our next visit

business_name: Stony Run Brew House | Brewery in York, PA
review_text: I've been here twice now, and I really want to love it but I just don't. The brew pub itself is nice and the staff are super awesome. The time I ordered the pretzel bites appetizer, which is way too small for the price and has way more cheese than pretzels. This time I ordered the chicken sandwich which was both dry and tasteless, but my wife seemed to have no complaint about the turkey avacado wrap. Over the two trips I've tried 5 beers, and all of them were average at best. The only beer I've found worth going for is the Barrel Aged Belgian Quad which was quite delicious. Also, the prices.. We had a sandwich, wrap, flight, and a 5 oz taster for $40.50, so more than $50 with tip. After leaving I was full of regret when I know I could have went to Holy Hound or Collusion instead.

business_name: Stony Run Brew House | Brewery in York, PA
review_text: We used to love this place. Went here on 1/9/21, it was very disappointing. The fries were cold. The service needs a lot of work, there were 3 employees not wearing mask.

business_name: Stony Run Brew House | Brewery in York, PA
review_text: Good local craft beer. Had a nice selection, but the cost was alittle high. 6$ for most pints and $6.50 for other beers. Limited menu for food and a bit pricey for what you get.

business_name: Stony Run Brew House | Brewery in York, PA
review_text: The food is overpriced for the quantity you get. I ordered the fish tacos. The fish meat inside was barely enough to be worth the $13 I paid for them. This place was overpriced and mediocre food. The Holly Hound's fish tacos were much better.

business_name: Stony Run Brew House | Brewery in York, PA
review_text: Nice people, good food. Good taps

business_name: Stony Run Brew House | Brewery in York, PA
review_text: Great, but beers were a little expensive. Loved the Reuben!

business_name: Stony Run Brew House | Brewery in York, PA
review_text: Great atmosphere
Good new brewery. Good variety of beers on draft and in cans. Definitely a spot we will go back to.
Place is small and the beers were underwhelming. Staff was super nice though.

I do like what they did with the place with the new ownership. It's much brighter and the added garage door windows is a great plus. The parking is tight and street parking might be required, but that's free. We shared the pretzel bites which were fantastic. I had the Angus Bacon Sliders which were decent, but the burger seemed unseasoned. Also for the price of 3 sliders that came with no sides ($12) Seemed on the expensive side. My wife had the Chicken tacos for $10. It came with 3 taco's which seemed to be a more reasonable price, but there was hardly anything on the tacos. My wife ended up combining the three taco's into 1 shell, but they were very delicious. The beers were served in 12oz classes and were a little on the expensive side for that size of glass. I totally get the price, but a large glass would be better to be more in line with other brewery's. I think I would give these guys a try again with hopes it was an off night or they improve. I do like the idea of the multiple brewers doing their thing.

I'm really pulling for this place but it has a way to go. I went to the soft opening and the food blew me away. Came back today after they were fully open for over a week and it was disappointing. Initial service was good but then I sat with an empty beer glass at the bar for atleast 10 to 15 minutes while manager/owners constantly walked by me and our server was MIA. One guy even stopped to talk to the people on either side of us and ignored my glass.
Beyond the service, the beers need work. Everything is mostly just an "ale". If you are looking for true IPA flavor it's not here, not yet anyway. The best beer on the menu is the Russian Imperial Stout.
The food is still good. The chef here is great and has a passion for what he does. I just hope everything else catches up to the kitchen.

Great place ...friendly staff good beer and guest taps and ciders.  Dj was great and had the crowd revved up..
Will come back soon for food beer and suggest tofiends and family.

The place is ok, and the staff are very friendly.  Our server was good!  The food was so so, and overpriced for what you get.  I can't speak to the wings because they were sold out when we were there, but the $16 and $17 salads we got left a lot to be desired, and would be half that price outside of a bar setting.  This place definitely seems to place a heavy focus on their beer, 17 on tap if I recall correctly.  I ordered a flight and really liked one of the four, but I'm by no means a beer expert.  I'd say if you give this place a try, go for the beer and the atmosphere and dine elsewhere before hand...or at least ask if they have wings first!

Came in from out of town to celebrate my college aged daughter's birthday. I complained my "medium" cooked burger was red on first bite, not pink...the waitress said 'well that's a medium." So I asked that it be cooked thoroughly and after 10 more minutes in the kitchen, it arrived as everyone else finished their meals. A thoroughly dry nothing burger. Yuck. Hard to believe that was Angus beef.

My daughter tried Grilled, Mountain Lager steeped bratwurst, cheese stuffed pierogies. For a whopping $15...you get a skinny hotdog sized bratwurst (which they slice lengthwise to make it look bigger) and 3 pierogies with a generous serving of garlic mash. The whole meal looked pathetic. Hard to believe the price of that meal!

So yeah, it sucked!

Literally terrible.  Only giving it 2 stars because they have more beer than the collegeville location used to.  Please for the love of god, close the west Chester branch and open the collegeville branch back up.  Or hire new cooks.

Got an overpriced sampler.  Only beer i really liked was the maple something or other.  Two tasted like crayons.  Jalapeno poppers were minuscule and looked like they were cooked a week ago.  Gf got a beef on wheck that was so drenched, she could hardly pick it up.  Maybe it was an off day,  but nothing special to make us want to come back.
Place was vacant, literally no other patrons at 745pm. Appetizer took 25minutes was soaked in fryer grease & undercooked. Repetitive beer selection, beer temp was too warm. This place won’t see 2020.

Steer clear! I was surprised by the menu and decided to give it a try since Box Car was not permitted for a full kitchen. When a salad and a chicken sandwich took 1 hour to come out, I new something was not quite right. My sandwich was almost room temperature. My suspicion is they run food between another restaurant and ABC... Buyer beware...

I was surprised by the food seemed soggy and Luke warm long time appalachian lover of other locations gettysburg, Harrisburg, Camp hill etc.etc. Ordered the wings w ranch sent blue cheese..asked for ranch instead , sent blue cheese again...ordered mile high meatloaf as it is my main staple at other locations came out was luke warm at best and the garlic bread was so soggy it was like mush. The Beer also does not seem consistant first hoppy trails was good , second heavy cooper taste all and all not pleased with this location and is sad considering it's in my own town... as stated before NOT HAPPY the waitress seemed overwhelmed but not her fault she did best she could even with constant reminders of needed silverware and my soda.again just very displeased with this location.

I came here with some co-workers for lunch while I was traveling. I think I've been one before many years ago but the menu was different this time.

I tried some of the hummus dip trio appetizer which was pretty good.

For my entree I got the cheddar, bacon, and apple pizza. It was more like a flat bread to me. It was big for one person, but I enjoyed it.

The food is slightly elevated bar food. It would be a good place to go for a happy hour.

Good local place. Kid friendly so we're here fairly often. Big menu. Food is good but not great. Service is usually friendly but not outstanding. They only have their beers on tap which are average. Having some 'guest' craft beers available would really help. It's a big restaurant and usually doesn't have a wait.

I’ve carried out food from here multiple times and it was always decent, but about 50% if the time would have mistakes with the orders. Figured I’d try it out in person: outdated interior, gross menu (had chocolate all over it during Covid so they clearly aren’t sanitized regularly), and the food was atrocious. Salads can cost upwards of $20 with a protein and the greens will come straight out of a bag with wilts. The bread was so hard and stale I couldn’t break it with my hands. Sweet potato fries felt like they had been sitting out for an hour. For this price point, this would be the last restaurant I’d go to.

On a side note, the staff are friendly.

Went here about a month- 2 months ago. Not great. I've heard great things about the different Mackenzie's. The nachos my boyfriend and I received were saturated in toppings, to the point where the chips were wilted when we tried to pick one up. The server was even disgusted and apologized. She was extremely nice! The food however was not enticing. Sad to say I will probably avoid here. :(

Very disappointing experience, had great selection of beer , but food was sub par got a crab cake sandwich it was 90 % bun thinking it was fake crab because the crab cake was about 2 mm .... don’t recommmend you go there for food ...

Couldn't give zero stars, though I would have preferred. Two waitresses saw my fiancee and I standing in the door, as we made sure we would be in view of anyone passing by, as well as the bar area. I guess our money was not green enough, as not one person came to greet us or even acknowledge us in any way within the 15+ minutes we were there, so we left. Cant even call it customer service, if you've been completely ignored.
Maybe I went on an off night but was not impressed. Their drinks seemed to be very watered down and the food was not great. Wait staff was very friendly though.
Nice place.  Friendly staff.  Good beer

Went to watch penn state football game, but they don't have Big 10 network, so couldn't.   Beer is so so.    Always good food and a clean place.  Nice clean bathrooms as well. Wait staff are friendly.

I’m very frustrated with McKenzies. We had a wonderful time sitting on the outside deck, but a fly landed in my drink after I took 2 sips of it. My husband approached the waiter saying “I don’t know what your policy is for this...” motioning to the fly, and the waiter very cordially offered to replace my drink. But then he charged us for the drink I did not get to enjoy. That soured the whole experience for me. If you do not “replace” fly filled drinks, at least have the decency to let me know customer retention isn’t worth the price of a drink.

It appears to be a popular place, given it was busy on a Wednesday night. The beer was ok, the 202 pale ale was lighter than I expected, had a very citrusy taste to it. It was one of the higher abv beers at 5%, which I found odd. The burger I had was cooked right and was good. I think the different selection of food is what stood out the most. Many things that you don't see everyday in other restaurants.
Great place to grab a beer and grab a quick bite after work.
Friendly service and wide selection of fine tasting food.

Went in around 6 for dinner and the place was empty. We should've turned around. Drink orders took forever considering there weren't any guests. I ordered crabcakes and they were disgustingly dry. It's rare I turn down a crabcakes. The Shepherd's pie was too hot (temperature) to eat. Second round of drinks,ordered during appetizers, didn't come out until after dinner was served.  Then my crabcakes which I hardly ate didn't come off the bill like any restaurant with a conscious would when they throw out a whole plate of food. you're probably better off eating your $20 bill. On a good note, the beers and french fries are decent.
Good food, good beer, good service.  Weekdays they have a good happy hour menu, and specials.

Very good BBQ chicken quesadillas and marsala meatloaf, although the garlic mashed potatoes are over salted. We sat in the bar area and the sound of the music was a little too loud to have a conversation easily.

I went here for lunch with my friend and from service to food this place was a disaster. She ordered a soup which took 20 minutes to come out. The server apologised saying that she got distracted. That on its own would not have been terrible but while we were waiting we found clumps of MOLD in the water bottle they brought to our table. When we finally got our server's attention she apologised and got us water from the bar. Needless to say our appetites were ruined. After some more waiting we realized that she hadn't told the manager about what had happened and we flagged a busser to call the manager over. Before she got to our table we noticed the manager speaking with our server but when she got to our table she acted as though she had no clue why we called her over. When we explained about the MOLD to the manager she apologised and told us that the kitchen staff was supposed to wash the bottles every day but you know sometimes things happen. (So they don't wash them after every use?!) I have been a restaurant manager before and have NEVER served MOLD to a guest nor would I have ever told them that sometimes things happen. For an hour and a half and a $30 meal they had so many opportunities to do better. Guess our company happy hours are going to be at City Works from now on.
Great food , nice atmosphere.
The bacon wrapped jalapeño poppers are awesome
Food is hit or miss. Service is always slow.
I waited 4 minutes for someone to ask me what I need. Then I just left.
Would have been 5 but there was a shadow in my picture...

4 stars for dinner, 2 stars for breakfast.

Dinner was pretty good. The soup of the day was too salty but the French onion soup was delicious and just right. Also loved their house whiskeys - both original and honey. Was a little disappointed they had run out of it for sale as I would have loved to bring home a bottle.

Breakfast was almost inedibly bad. I ordered oatmeal with fruit + brown sugar. It came as a sticky mush and was missing brown sugar. My partner ordered an omlette and it was overcooked and sad and hard.

Please call me karen if you wish, tried to wait for a table of 8 and they literally told my friend and I to wait outside in the rain for 45 to 1 hour where we can have a drink too. I asked if we may wait inside by the host table where some people were just taken away to their table. The answer was No. They also mentioned to go wait at the cove right outside but we explained there were a hunch of people and full.

Unreasonable with their attitude. Pandemic is getting out of hands. We told them no thank you and left. What a disappointment with these young hosts.
one of a kind outlet  where their is something  for  everyone,  quite frankly and happy to see Food Trucks added  to  the experience.
Good was very good and price was not bad.

Poopy, they have 2 people working, it took 45 minutes to get the food. The chicken was severely undercooked and didn’t taste like something you should eat. Took forever for everything never coming back
Amazing and kind staff, great atmosphere and a nice piano

Ok beer and overly salty, generic brewpub fare. Grilled cheese came on a previously frozen ciabatta with an underripe tomato and Ruffles potato chips.. A couple of the beers had the bitter, stringent notes of tannins. Plastic plates and utensils.
Great service and food.
All the best wishes to this establishment. The employees are top notch. The management needs work. I was discriminated against the type of face covering I had. Now this is going a bit far.

The atmosphere is cool. They took an old bank and converted it into a brewery. There's an original vault door in the back that's totally worth checking out. And for me, that's where it stops. The beer, sadly, was not good. The stout was a brown ale, at best. Flavor was good but not a stout. It was thin and light w/no head. The 'North of Here' New England IPA had a flavor profile that lent itself to memories of cough medicine and chemicals. Four of us tried it and everyone agreed, not a winning recipe. Amongst the four of us, we just couldnt finish it. Sorry guys, I just can't get behind the beer. I didn't try the food but everything I saw (menu & coming out from the kitchen) looked fried, fried, fried. No thanks.

Sadly, I won't be back nor can I recommend.
Nice new local spot, we enjoyed it. My husband liked the beer. They need to expand their wine offerings, even though they are a brewery.

I have to start by saying that I am so glad we finally have a brewery in town! It’s so convenient to walk to since we live near by. The ambiance is perfect. Nice lighting, cool vibes. We even ran into some neighbors while we were there which really gave it that warm, neighborly feel.

We are big IPA fans so naturally we went for the ‘North of Here’ IPA. I will say it was pretty good. Although it is labeled as a “hazy” IPA and having tried many hazy beers, I am not sure if this hits the nail on the head of tasting “Hazy”. Felt like more of an Irish red ale. Aside from that, we are eager to go back and try the ‘Slow Coaster’ IPA and some of the other beers!

Food: We got the pulled pork sandwich and the dip sandwich. Both were VERY tasty. We opted for the fries on the side in substitution of the chips. This was a 2 dollar up-charge per meal and this is where the slight disappointment sunk in. We received maybe a pinch of fries on the side. For the amount of money you’re paying, you really need to get at least a heaping pile of fries. It’s one thing if the fries weren’t an up charge, but since it was $2, it probably wouldn’t hurt their margin much had they given a plateful. We were definitely unsatisfied with the quantity (which can easily be fixed.. we understand, you’re new!)

Will there be happy hour specials soon where it almost incentivizes us to come in? We are definitely comparing this place to Victory, and we can get in and out for 3 beers, 2 burgers and a huge plate of fries for under $24.

I’m giving this place the benefit of the doubt just because it is so new. It is a great start; there’s definitely room for improvement. I hope this review is seen as constructive criticism and taken with an open mind from management. We look forward to seeing this place evolve and become something very special!
Good beer but glasses smelled like stale eggs.
Boo I say booooo
Yesterday. Food was lousy. Fried mushrooms were cold and soggy. Pork sandwich was mush. First time visit.
Great place! Best cream of crab soup around here. Fries are bangin!
Small corner pub. Staff was friendly and attentive. The food was good. Only a few tables and a small bar to sit at. It can accommodate a large table or tow bit not much more.
Awesome nachos and wings!  Good choices of draft microbrews.  Friendly service.

I have eaten in the brick house several times and the service and food has always been great and I love supporting local businesses. However, last night was different.  Although, I understand Saturday nights are extremely busy, the female bartender was very rude to me and the person I was with.  We walked on the door...the bartender abruptly yelled across the bar there were no tables available and then turned her back to us ....not a way to greet your customers.  There were seats at the bar and we would have sat at the bar and waited for a table but decided to go to another local restaurant... which was just as busy....but the bartender was far more pleasant.  I understand if your busy but your bartender could have been a little more friendly or atleast smiled .

Fun, fun, fun place to get a drink or have a meal.  Sometimes it gets so busy that service is slow.  It is a very small establishment with new owners, and you can easily tell that there are regulars who are frequent visitors.  There is a tendancy for it to get loud sometimes, but the customer area is part of the first floor of a home -- very close quarters.  But nobody seems to mind, everybody is having a good time!
Great pub food and drink
Good food! But small place definitely not the place for a large party or big family.
Very neat place...food was good...will go back.
Great service and staff in a small Pub.  Slow down or you'll drive right by.  Worth checking out!
Good service. Clean and great menu
The service  and  food is very good.
Nice little spot, the food is okay and the food is reasonably priced, however it has a really strong locals only vibe to it.
Good drinks, usually dead, take cards and make decent drinks. To bad I only get off work at 11 and they are already closed by then
It's a community pub. Neither stellar or horrible.
Although a little expensive the food is good.
Friendly staff,and patrons
Great corner bar
Found a good stout, nice food selection, kids menu AND gluten free offered
Good beers...casual atmosphere. Didn't get to try the food... So holding off on that "5th" star until then!

I've been here before and only had beer which is always good. The food however does have something to be desired.  While the sliders were good and right temp the fries, fried mozzarella and mac n cheese were all lukewarm.  It's a shame because otherwise the food was tasty.
Great food, great beer. The place was smaller than I expected but the atmosphere was nice and staff friendly
Good beers and cool atmosphere. Food from the barbeque place next door.
Best place to grab a good brew and food in Sarver.
Good place with good food and drinks!! Very friendly!!
good product minimalistic design poor costumer service
Awesome food good craft beer
Good beer
Enjoyed their beers, the jalapeño burger needed something more, like a hot jelly, and the place was crowded (probably due to it being on of the first nice evening outside in a while).

The good... The French fries they are very good.
The chicken salad looked very good.
Outdoor seating.
They fixed their hand held units billing glitch.

The bad
Overcooked, under flavored burgers.
Appetizers and food arrived at the same time on a table that could barely fit just one or the other.
They only pour 5 of each to go can in the am, so by evening there is no beer available to go.
Billing for another tables order after having already checked the bill.
Having to call and spend 20 minutes on hold while waiting for them to fix the billing issue.
No beer being available to go.
All in all I would give them a second chance with ordering no appetizers,  getting a chicken salad and paying with cash. That might avoid all the issues and the expense might feel worth it.
Grilled cheese and pork wings were awesome! The stout was very good, did not personally care for the IPAs or others.
The food is good and the beers are excellent. Great service from our server today.
Good beers and food. Service was ok. Nice outdoor seating
Good beer, and a nice place to just relax. Really good place that just opened; recommend it!
Prices are high. Wait staff was great. Food was okay.

Edit: The restaurant owner is confusing me with someone else. I never spoke with them on the phone. I was not in on the 3rd day of opening. It was early on, but not within the first week. We were 100% the only customers wearing masks and were 100% on the receiving end of some serious "stink eye" from guests. It was super obvious. Ha! This town is not very mask friendly as the issue has been politicized.

They've definitely reworked their COVID19 precautions, and I have heard that it's gotten better. Again, I don't want to make that a huge issue, but I thought it was important as I would like to know before taking my baby or grandparents in. I'm glad it's better, and we fully understand how tough this is for everyone, especially restaurants.

As for the food, I'm sure we'll give it a try again.

***

The safety measures at this place were questionable and after reading their COVID19 precautions on Facebook I can see why. They basically tell people to not worry about masks. (They've since changed their policy because Harmony cracked down on restaurants not committing with COVID19 regulations). You can have an exemption policy without telling people that you will never question them for not wearing a mask. It's unnecessary information unless you are telling people not to worry about it.

The place was shoulder to shoulder packed. Absolutely no social distancing.  Not one guest, entering or leaving or picking up take out was wearing a mask except for us. A few employees had masks around their chins. We definitely got the stink eye upon entering, so I'm thinking this is a place where people go to rebel against restrictions. That's fine, but we won't be returning until the COVID stuff is over.

***Harmony has since enforced regulations with the local restaurants.

Food: Burger patty and bun were good. Firecracker burger could use a sauce. Butter on the buns is too much grease for a burger.

Poutine was meh. It was like cottage cheese on fries with a not great gravy. I like a melty cheese curd and a beefy gravy. Eg: West Penn had excellent poutine.

Boneless wings were almost inedible because they were so dry. Meat was dry and they needed more sauce. The blue cheese dressing was really good.

The mac and cheese was overcooked to the point of mush. My baby liked it though.

They just opened, so they're working out the kinks. I'm sure that we'll try it again when everything has calmed down, but for now, I would not take my parents, grandparents or baby in there to eat.
Beers were overrated and kinda pricey. Fries were good.
This place is nothing special. After watching an employee not wash hands in the bathroom I don’t think I will be returning.
Good food and beers

lady in charge who was visibly intoxicated began yelling at worker for no reason when he was doing his job very well and caused him to quit. Truly lost a good worker he is very friendly and part of the reason I have continued to come back for the past couple weeks
The beer is not good. The restroom door  does not lock. 1st time it was pretty good. Second time it was bad. Now i can complain.
1 tube 6$/glass beer no volume n no music

business_name: John Russell Brewing Company Brew House & Restaurant
review_text:
Good rebranding of this location. The menu isn't much different, but there are beers being brewed onsite, as well beers to go and other guest taps.

Flights are available - 6 beers to a flight.

It looked crowded, but there is a decent amount of seating between the first and second floor. Service was relatively fast, and the staff was very friendly. A manager was working the crowd to check on things as well, which is always nice to see.

Food choices are the typical bar choices; wood fired pizzas, flatbread, BBQ wings, etc. My nachos were pretty good and my friend really liked his flatbread.

Pricing was reasonable as well. That, coupled with everything above, will have me returning, I'm sure.
The food was absolutely delicious!  Especially the flatbread. It is a little more high end than we anticipated, but the service was excellent.
They have a large menu and a large selection of beers! The food was tasty and the service was good! A little bit on the pricey side though. Their burgers and the fish and chips were very good!
Good food, service and a very interesting beer menu.  We were a group of 6 and everyone enjoyed it. Will be back...
The service was ok. My friends had to ask for the server to come back to get our orders. But food was good.
Very disappointed!  Place was empty, service was bad, and it took 1-1/2 hours to get our food.
Great food twist on classics but with a classic look
Nice restaurant / tavern. Good variety and quality of food.
Had a sirloin that was cooked to perfect. Service was good but the meal made is what made the experience. Prepare for a walk as parking spaces are hard to find.
Love the atmosphere, the food was a big dissapointment. Can't believe this place had a 4.6 star rating.
Prices to park for events is kinda high. All events are fun here.

business_name: Town Tap by Conshohocken Brewing Co.
review_text: I had to give it a one star to review, but I would give them no stars or minus if I could. My family & I stood over an hour waiting with two small children.  Tables came open, but they would not put tables together to seat us.  We even offered to take a table for 4 & hold the children. We were ignored. When we left there were 14 seats open.  Two of the tables could have been easily been put together. They did not seat us. I hope the other people waiting got a seat.  Pitiful. Not impressed!!!
Never again!! Worst place ever!!
